name: profile-suggest defaults to the baseline tier when no stack, compliance, financial, or government signals are detected
command: mkdir -p repo && printf '# Empty Project\nNothing here.\n' > repo/README.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/profile-suggest/scan.sh" --root repo 2>out.txt && grep -q 'suggested_profile=baseline' out.txt && grep -q 'signals=0' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
